title: PRISMA-P 2015 Checklist for Impact of hospital pharmacy interventions on length of stay in hospitals: a protocol for a systematic review and meta-analysis
author: Holis, Renata Vesela
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description:
PRISMA-P 2015 Checklist for Impact of hospital pharmacy interventions on length of stay in hospitals: a protocol for a systematic review and meta-analysis. 
 This document contains the PRISMA-P 2015 checklist for the systematic review protocol titled "Impact of hospital pharmacy interventions on length of stay in hospitals: a protocol for a systematic review and meta-analysis". The checklist includes 17 items essential for transparent and complete reporting of systematic review protocols. It covers administrative information, introduction, and methods sections, ensuring adhernece to high standards of research reporting.
